hypothesis: Si–X alloy anodes whose Li+ migration-channel radius varies by ≤10% between fully lithiated and fully delithiated states will exhibit ≤150% volumetric expansion at full lithiation and retain ≥85% of initial capacity after 300 cycles at 0.5C in 1 M LiPF6 in EC:DEC (1:1), whereas alloys exceeding this channel-variation threshold will not.
